  have : E(C) ∩ M ∪ E(C) ∩ M' = E(C) := by
    ext e; simp only [mem_union, mem_inter_iff, mem_symmDiff]
    exact ⟨fun h => h.elim And.left And.left, fun he => (hEC he).elim (Or.inl ⟨he, ·.1⟩) (Or.inr ⟨he, ·.1⟩)⟩
  exact hC.encard_inter_eq_of_partition hdisj this

have hdisj := hM.disjoint_inter_of_isCycleGraph_symmDiff hM' hC hCG.le
  have hC_sub : E(C) ⊆ M ∆ M' := fun e he ↦ by
    have := hCG.le.2 he
    simp only [IsMatching.restrict₂, restrict_edgeSet, loopRemove_edgeSet, mem_inter_iff, 
               mem_diff, mem_setOf] at this
    exact this.1
  have hunion : E(C) = (E(C) ∩ M) ∪ (E(C) ∩ M') := by
    ext e; simp only [mem_union, mem_inter_iff]
    constructor
    · intro he; cases mem_symmDiff.mp (hC_sub he) with
      | inl h => exact Or.inl ⟨he, h.1⟩
      | inr h => exact Or.inr ⟨he, h.1⟩
    · rintro (⟨he, -⟩ | ⟨he, -⟩) <;> exact he
  rw [hunion, encard_union_eq hdisj] at hC.even_encard
  exact (ENat.even_add.mp hC.even_encard).resolve_right (fun ⟨h1, h2⟩ ↦ h1.ne_one (by rfl)) |>.2.symm
